allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\('user:',u.get\('username'\),'secret:',u.get\('secret','n/a'\),'grants:',u.get\('directAccessGrantsEnabled'\)\) for u in d.get\('clients',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(m.get\('name'\), '->', m.get\('config',{}\).get\('claim.name'\)\) for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('issuer:', d.get\('issuer'\)\); print\('auth_endpoint:', d.get\('authorization_endpoint'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Keycloak UP — issuer:', d.get\('issuer'\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = $_; $ports = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess $p.Id -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).LocalPort -join ","; "$\($p.Id\) ports=[$ports]" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\kanaka\\Documents\\Zoom\\AegisPay\\AegisPay"; mvn --batch-mode --no-transfer-progress package -pl services/notification-service,services/ai-platform,services/data-pipeline,services/reconciliation-service -DskipTests -q 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Build OK" } else { Write-Host "Build FAILED exit=$LASTEXITCODE" })

PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($true\) { $tries++; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8180/realms/aegispay" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Keycloak ready after $tries tries"; break } catch { if \($tries -ge 80\) { Write-Host "Keycloak timeout"; break }; Write-Host "  Keycloak not ready \($tries/80\)..."; Start-Sleep 5 } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\kanaka\\Documents\\Zoom\\AegisPay\\AegisPay"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("services\\api-gateway\\target\\api-gateway-1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.jar"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "BOOT-INF/classes/application.yml" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($entry.Open\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content | Select-String "redis" -Context 0,6)
PowerShell(docker exec aegispay-redis redis-cli -a aegispay_dev ping 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec aegispay-redis redis-cli -a aegispay_dev HELLO 2 AUTH default aegispay_dev 2>&1)

PowerShell($tries=0; while\($tries -lt 30\){ $tries++; $ag=$false; $ns=$false; try{ Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -EA Stop | Out-Null; $ag=$true }catch{} ; try{ Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8086/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2 -EA Stop | Out-Null; $ns=$true }catch{}; $status = "api-gateway=$\(if\($ag\){'UP'}else{'waiting'}\) notification-service=$\(if\($ns\){'UP'}else{'waiting'}\)"; Write-Host "[$tries/30] $status"; if\($ag -and $ns\){ Write-Host "Both services UP"; break }; Start-Sleep 8 })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8080/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "200: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "$\(\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)\): $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" } else { "No response: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-Content "c:\\Users\\kanaka\\Documents\\Zoom\\AegisPay\\AegisPay\\logs\\reconciliation-service.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 30; Write-Host "---FILE SIZE: $\(\(Get-Item 'c:\\Users\\kanaka\\Documents\\Zoom\\AegisPay\\AegisPay\\logs\\reconciliation-service.log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length\) bytes")
PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=aegispay_dev aegispay-postgres psql -U aegispay -d aegispay_ledger -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=aegispay_dev aegispay-postgres psql -U aegispay -d aegispay_ledger -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public' ORDER BY tablename;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD=aegispay_dev aegispay-postgres psql -U aegispay -d postgres -c "SELECT datname FROM pg_database WHERE datname LIKE 'aegispay%' ORDER BY datname;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec aegispay-keycloak bash -c "/opt/keycloak/bin/kcadm.sh get clients -r aegispay -q clientId=aegispay-web --fields id,clientId,defaultClientScopes,optionalClientScopes --no-config --server http://localhost:8180 --realm master --user admin --password admin" 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "^Logging" })
PowerShell(docker exec aegispay-keycloak bash -c "/opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh export --dir /tmp/kc-export --realm aegispay --users realm_file 2>&1 | tail -5")
